name: data-warehouse-analytics-data-export-engine
description: T181 DataExportEngine — ANALYTICS_ENGINE archetype. F411 IExportEncryptionService (PLATFORM-ONLY) — no bypass. F412 IExportAuditService (PLATFORM-ONLY) — no bypass. F423 IPIIMaskingService — PII masked before export. downloadUrl must have expiresAt.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: F411 encryption PLATFORM-ONLY no bypass, F412 audit PLATFORM-ONLY no bypass, F423 PII masking before export, downloadUrl requires expiresAt
Retrieve ANALYTICS_ENGINE arch pattern + platform-only-fabric + pii-masking-before-export + expiring-download-url + export-audit patterns for T181

Break T181 into: receive export request → F423 mask PII → F411 encrypt export data → F412 audit export operation → generate downloadUrl with expiresAt → storeDocument(exportRecord) → return downloadUrl

Generate data-export-engine.service.ts — HTTP POST via DynamicController. F423 IPIIMaskingService runs FIRST before any export. F411 IExportEncryptionService (PLATFORM-ONLY) — no bypass flag, no conditional skip. F412 IExportAuditService (PLATFORM-ONLY) — no bypass flag, no conditional skip. downloadUrl MUST include expiresAt field. NEVER return raw unmasked PII in export payload.
Named check validation: f423_pii_masking_first, f411_no_bypass, f412_no_bypass, download_url_has_expires_at, no_raw_pii_in_export
Score generated code 0-100 against T181 iron rules: PII masking order, F411/F412 no-bypass, expiresAt on downloadUrl, complete audit trail
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=pii-masking-first+no-bypass-fabrics+expires-at-url, rejected=skip-pii-masking OR bypass-encryption OR bypass-audit OR missing-expires-at. curriculumTier=2.
